home.title: Learn Without Limits
home.subtitle: Discover courses taught by expert instructors. Learn at your own pace with high-quality video content.
home.whyUsSubtitle: An online learning platform designed for your success
home.expertInstructorsDesc: Learn from top industry professionals with years of real-world experience.
home.flexibleLearningDesc: Learn anytime, anywhere with high-quality videos and progress tracking.
home.certificateDesc: Earn certificates upon course completion to boost your professional profile.
home.communityDesc: Connect with fellow learners, share insights, and grow together in our active community forums.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in just a few simple steps
home.step1Desc: Sign up for free and set up your learner profile in minutes.
home.step2Desc: Explore our catalog and find courses that match your goals.
home.step3Desc: Watch lessons, complete exercises, and track your progress.
home.step4Desc: Complete courses and earn certificates to showcase your skills.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Hear from students who transformed their careers
home.testimonial1: Learnify completely changed how I approach learning. The courses are well-structured and the instructors are top-notch.
home.testimonial2: I went from beginner to landing my dream job in 6 months. The community support was incredible.
home.testimonial3: The flexibility to learn at my own pace while working full-time made all the difference.
home.getStartedDesc: Join thousands of learners and begin your learning journey today.

about.title: About Learnify
about.description: We connect passionate instructors with eager learners worldwide. Our mission is to make quality education accessible to everyone, everywhere.
about.welcomeDesc: We're glad you're here. Explore courses tailored to your goals.
about.interestLabel: What do you want to learn?

mission.title: Learners
mission.desc: Students from around the world trust Learnify to grow their skills.

courses.title: Courses
courses.desc: A growing library of expert-led courses across multiple disciplines.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.desc: Industry professionals sharing real-world knowledge and experience.

satisfaction.title: Satisfaction
satisfaction.desc: Our learners consistently rate their experience highly.

web.label: Web Development
web.title: Build for the Web
web.desc: From front-end to back-end, learn the skills to build modern, performant web applications used by millions.

data.label: Data Science
data.title: Turn Data into Insight
data.desc: Learn to collect, analyze, and visualize data to drive smarter decisions across industries.

design.label: UI/UX Design
design.title: Design Experiences People Love
design.desc: Master the principles of user-centered design and build beautiful, intuitive digital products.

devops.label: DevOps & Cloud
devops.title: Build, Deploy, Scale
devops.desc: Learn to automate infrastructure, manage deployments, and keep systems running reliably at scale.
